Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.webhook

Class WebhookRewardEntry

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.webhook.WebhookRewardEntry
public final class WebhookRewardEntry extends Object
Represents one webhook entry under a reward's "Webhooks:" list. Two payload styles:
  • Raw JSON: getJson()
  • Discord convenience payload: content + optional embed fields
All fields may contain placeholders and are expanded at execution time.

  • Constructor Summary

    Creates a reward entry.

  • Constructor Details

    • WebhookRewardEntry

      public WebhookRewardEntry(String webhookId, String json, String content, boolean embedEnabled, String embedTitle, String embedDescription, String embedColorHex, String embedThumbnailUrl, boolean footerEnabled, String footerText)
      Creates a reward entry.
      Parameters:
      webhookId - webhook definition id
      json - raw json payload (nullable)
      content - discord content (nullable)
      embedEnabled - embed enabled
      embedTitle - embed title
      embedDescription - embed description
      embedColorHex - hex color #RRGGBB (nullable)
      embedThumbnailUrl - thumbnail url (nullable)
      footerEnabled - footer enabled
      footerText - footer text (nullable)
